acceptance_criteria: Clear-style actions and structured edit rejection proof: positive path proves approved fields accept clear/delete/cut, negative path proves locked fields reject with structured messages.

assertions.label: Delete key is not suppressed on approved editable field (quantity)
assertions.expected: suppressKeyboardEvent returns false for Delete on quantity column with editable-only selection.
assertions.observed: Unit test: allows Delete key on approved editable field without suppression

assertions.label: Ctrl+X cut is not suppressed on approved-only column selection
assertions.expected: suppressCutToClipboard is false and suppressKeyboardEvent returns false for Ctrl+X when selection covers only editable columns (quantity, cogsPerUnit).
assertions.observed: Unit test: allows Ctrl+X cut on approved-only selection without suppression

assertions.label: onCellSelectionDeleteStart does not surface rejection on editable-only selection
assertions.expected: No blocked message appears when onCellSelectionDeleteStart fires with selection covering only approved editable columns (quantity through unitPrice).
assertions.observed: Unit test: does not surface rejection for onCellSelectionDeleteStart on editable-only selection

assertions.label: Ctrl+X cut is suppressed when selection includes locked columns
assertions.expected: suppressKeyboardEvent returns true and surfaces structured rejection when selection range extends to lineTotal.
assertions.observed: Pre-existing unit test (line 522): suppresses cut shortcuts when the current selection includes locked document columns

assertions.label: Delete key is suppressed when selection includes locked columns
assertions.expected: suppressKeyboardEvent returns true and surfaces structured rejection when focused on productDisplayName.
assertions.observed: Pre-existing unit test (line 583): suppresses delete shortcuts when the current selection includes locked document columns

assertions.label: Fill start is blocked when selection reaches locked columns
assertions.expected: onFillStart surfaces a blocked fill message when selection extends to lineTotal.
assertions.observed: Pre-existing unit test (line 639): surfaces a blocked fill message when selection reaches locked document columns

prior_review.label: Code-proven closure via unit tests
prior_review.conclusion: Both positive path (approved fields accept clear/delete/cut) and negative path (locked fields reject with structured messages) are covered by unit tests. Live staging confirmation deferred until a fresh build is available.
